items.title: Gunman opens fire at two locations in the Greek capital, leaving several people wounded
items.summary: Police said that the man was armed with a shotgun and initially opened fire at a social security office in the centre of the Greek capital, wounding an employee

items.title: Israel-Iran war LIVE:  Iran says U.S. no longer in position to ‘dictate’ policy to other nations
items.summary: U.S., Iran clash over Tehran's nuclear programme as review of atomic treaty begins at UN; Iranian Foreign Minister praises Russia ties, welcomes Moscow's support for diplomacy

items.title: U.S. says examining latest Iran proposal on Hormuz

items.title: Alleged drug trafficking kingpin deported from Türkiye to India
items.summary: 59-year-old accused Salim Dola was handed over to the Narcotics Control Bureau and taken to its headquarters in Delhi

items.title: U.S. no longer in position to ‘dictate’ policy to other nations, says Iran

items.title: Afghan officials say Pakistani strikes killed 7, wounded 85 in first attacks since peace talks
items.summary: Pakistan's Ministry of Information and Broadcasting dismissed Afghan media reports and official statements about the strikes on the university as “a blatant lie”

items.title: Bill to create 100-feet buffer zones around places of worship introduced in U.S. Congress
items.summary: Congressman Tom Suozzi, a Democrat from New York, and Congressman Max Miller, a Republican from Ohio, have introduced the Safeguarding Access to Congregations and Religious Establishments from Disruption (SACRED) Act

items.title: The evolving China-Pakistan space cooperation
items.summary: The ‘all-weather ties’ between China and Pakistan are reflected in their space cooperation as well

items.title: Trump administration fires entire National Science Board
items.summary: Board members were told on April 24 they were being ousted effective immediately, members Yolanda Gil and Keivan Stassun, said in emailed statements; no reason was provided for the action

items.title: How a surgeon kept a Sudan hospital functioning on the war’s front line
items.summary: Dr. Jamal Eltaeb was leading Al Nao hospital in Omdurman, just outside the capital, Khartoum, as control of the urban area shifted between Sudan’s army and paramilitary fighters

items.title: White House to review presidential security; spotlight on line of succession

items.title: Trumps call for ABC to fire Jimmy Kimmel — again — after morbid joke about First Lady
items.summary: The remark about the President's wife was part of a routine in “Jimmy Kimmel Live” where the host pretended to deliver a comedy routine at the White House Correspondents' Association dinner

items.title: Trump not happy with latest Iran proposal to end the war, U.S. official says

items.title: Legal limits on U.S. war involvement
items.summary: The War Powers Act requires the President to seek authorisation from Congress for the continued use of military force abroad beyond 60 days of such involvement, raising questions over the Trump administration’s future course of action in the ongoing military engagement in West Asia

items.title: Freedom of navigation not negotiable: IMO addresses UN Security Council on maritime safety in Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Any deviation from these well-established and recognized principles would set a negative precedent and severely undermine the integrity and stability of shipping operations worldwide, IMO Secretary-General said

items.title: Indonesia train crash toll rises to 14 as rescuers work to remove trapped passengers
items.summary: “A taxi on the train tracks was hit by the commuter train, and the long-distance train hit a women-only carriage on the commuter train,” Bobby Rasyidin, Chief Executive of state-owned railway firm PT KAI, said

items.title: U.S., Iran clash over Tehran's nuclear programme as review of atomic treaty begins at UN

items.title: 600 Google staff urge CEO to reject classified military AI contract

items.title: Man charged with attempted assassination of Trump in White House correspondents' dinner shooting

items.title: U.K. PM Starmer faces possible Parliament probe over Mandelson

items.title: China vows countermeasures if EU enacts 'Made in Europe' plan

items.title: Bahrain strips dozens of citizenship over Iran support

items.title: German Chancellor Merz says Iran is humiliating U.S. as talks stall
items.summary: “The Iranians are obviously very skilled at negotiating, ⁠or rather, very skilful at not negotiating, letting the Americans travel to Islamabad and then leave again without any result,” says ​German Chancellor

items.summary: While their manufacturing cost is cheaper, these drones can inflict damage worth millions of dollars. Drone warfare has left even mighty powers lagging in the race. items.title: Israel-Iran war updates: Trump says Iran can call U.S. if it wants to negotiate
